perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up hook of the female creator interacting with actress Park Gyu-young in a crowded, dimly lit event space; they are holding hands and smiling. (2) Transition to daytime outdoor and indoor scenes where the creator participates in activities resembling the 'Squid Game' series, including a 'Red Light, Green Light' setup and a playground area. (3) Scene shifts to a formal press/VIP event stage where actors Kang Ha-neul, Park Gyu-young, and Park Sung-hoon are interviewed and interact with the crowd. (4) The creator approaches the actors for personal photos and signatures during a mingle session. (5) The final segment shows the creator in a hotel room, looking at her laptop screen and reacting with shock and joy to the footage she just filmed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in fast-paced Mandarin with an excited and cheerful tone. (2) Ambient sounds of a crowd cheering and the 'Red Light, Green Light' mechanical doll voice are heard during the game montage. (3) Transitions to professional audio from a microphone where a male actor (Kang Ha-neul) speaks in English ('Hello... how are you?') followed by a female actress (Park Gyu-young) speaking fluent English about her appreciation for the fans. (4) A male actor (Park Sung-hoon) speaks in Korean, translated by subtitles. (5) The music volume increases during the photo session, mixed with overlapping crowd chatter. (6) Ends with the creator's high-pitched gasps and excited shouting in a hotel room over soft background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: '跟《魷魚遊戲3》朴圭瑛說「我從台灣來」的話，反應是？' (2) Functional subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin, Korean, and English dialogue throughout. (3) Decorative variety-show style text overlays include: '抓抓手臂' (Grabbing the arm), '卡司們登場' (The cast appears), '英文很流利!!!' (English is very fluent!!!), and '昏倒' (Fainting) during the ending reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Event Montage -> Celebrity Interaction -> Post-event Reflection/Reaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator, 3 main actors, and approximately 40 fans/staff in the background of the event shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The female creator has long dark hair and wears a green event t-shirt and black skirt. Park Gyu-young wears a Gucci patterned short-sleeved shirt. Kang Ha-neul wears a black and white bowling shirt. Park Sung-hoon wears a black jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The locations include a replica of the 'Squid Game' set with colorful walls and a giant doll, a professional event stage with 'SQUID GAME 3' branding and pink/purple lighting, and a modern hotel room with a desk and laptop.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright natural daylight outdoors, vibrant pink/purple neon studio lighting at the event, and warm indoor lighting in the hotel.

vocal_qualities.pitch: Varied from deep (male actors) to high (female creator)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share the creator's personal experience attending a Netflix VIP event for 'Squid Game 3,' focusing on the emotional highlight of interacting closely with the main cast members and proving their friendliness to her audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video centers around a Netflix-sponsored event for the promotion of 'Squid Game 3.'

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy reaction shots, fast-cut editing style, and interactive text overlays that engage the viewer as if they are part of the journey.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses 'parasocial' elements by showing a relatable fan experience with high-profile celebrities, which is a highly successful format for social media engagement.
